title: Pantheon Model Plan Configuration
description: Defines which models each agent tier maps to for a given service+plan combination
$comment:
Model Resolution Behavior:

1. EXPLICIT STRING (e.g., 'opencode-go/kimi-k2.6') → Uses exactly this model
2. 'auto' → Inherits from the chat's active model (set via /model command). When the user switches models mid-session, the agent automatically follows. Useful for experimentation and cost control.
3. null → Omits the model field from the agent config. Falls back to: (a) top-level 'model' in opencode.json root, (b) platform default, (c) error if none defined.

Priority Chain:
  Agent-specific model (string/auto/null)
    → if null: top-level model in opencode.json
    → if auto: chat-selected model
    → if missing: platform default

anyOf.description: Inherit from chat's currently selected model (/model command)
Omit field - fallback to top-level model or platform default

models.description: Tier-to-model mapping. Each tier can be an explicit model string, 'auto' to inherit from chat selection, or null to fallback to top-level config

free.description: Free tier model (optional) - used as fallback for fast tier when available

default.description: Balanced model for most coding tasks

agent_overrides.description: Per-agent model overrides (optional). Values can be explicit model string, 'auto', or null

handoff_models.description: Handoff-specific model overrides (optional), keyed as 'source__target'. Values can be explicit model string, 'auto', or null
